text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Air Groove talking to both dorm
leaders in the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, it isn't realistic for us to be buying
luxury goods.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But many of the academy students come from
wealthy families... What can we do to satisfy them
without breaking the bank?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Grah, we're not gettin' anywhere! You're all
wastin' way too much time sweatin' the small stuff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All you gotta do is wash your tail, blow dry it, and
you're done! It's that simple!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Improper tail care can harm a racer's
performance. We cannot afford to scrimp on such
vital products.
choice_data_list: Are you talking about tail-care products?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Eavesdropping, were you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer. Apologies for keeping Air Groove
from you, but we wanted her opinion on this
matter as the student council vice president, you
see.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
To fill you in, we've been receiving requests from
our residents for a greater variety of tail-care
products.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume's tail forms an important part of
her physique. It affects the body's overall
balance.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In extreme cases, poor tail care can even impair
the movement of the legs.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's especially important for Umamusume who
race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For this reason, many students bring in their own
products. However, not everyone can afford such
luxuries.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I get that we gotta make sure no student
gets left behind, no matter their circumstances...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But c'mon! There's way too many to choose from! We can't please everyone!
choice_data_list: I'll try and think of something too.
I'll try and think of something too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But c'mon! There's way too many to choose from! We can't please everyone!
choice_data_list: I'll try and think of something too.
I'll try and think of something too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Am I hearing things? You may not have noticed,
but you don't have a tail.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! Input from someone without a tail could
be just the new perspective we need!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You raise a fair point. I suppose it's true that
trainers are well-versed in Umamusume affairs.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll allow it. First, I'll run you through
the opinions we've heard so far.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Air Groove's approval, I join the discussion,
contributing my own thoughts as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your help back there in the
cafeteria. I think we have a better idea of what
new products to bring in now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's a little strange to think about. Having a
tail is so normal for us, yet for you, it's something
you've never known.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I wonder what it'd be like if you did have a
tail...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For one, I imagine I'd give you a strict talking-to
every morning about proper tail care.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove smiles ever so slightly as she shares
her words of affection.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We have our own unique problems, and you have
yours. I suppose there's no harm in that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I forgot to ask! What do you use, Air
Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Me? I generally use...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Bar soap.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wha... Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ahahahahaha! Soap! Bar soap at that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You, the kinda gal who looks like she'd only use high-end conditioners! Using bar soap! Ahahah!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What are you laughing at?! There's nothing funny
about using naturally-sourced soap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume have to deal with a lot more than I
had initially thought. I promise myself to do all
that I can to support them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine Air Groove will be using her favorite bar
of soap later today in order to maintain her tail's
luster.
